formulas.formula: Trade revenues + Related party revenues = Total Sales and other operating revenues
components: Sales and other operating revenues - Trade
Sales and other operating revenues - Related parties
formulas.operation: Sales and other operating revenues - Trade + Sales and other operating revenues - Related parties

formulas.formula: Total revenues minus total operating costs equals operating income
formulas.operation: Sales and other operating revenues - Total operating costs and expenses

formulas.formula: Cost of sales + Impairments + SGA + RD = Total operating costs
formulas.operation: Cost of sales + Impairments + Selling, general and administrative expenses + Research and development expenses

formulas.formula: Operating income plus non-operating items equals income before equity and taxes
components: Income from continuing operations before equity investments and income taxes
formulas.operation: Operating income - Interest expense + Interest income + Gain on sale of business + Other income (expense), net
formulas.result_label: Income from continuing operations before equity investments and income taxes

formulas.formula: Income before equity and taxes plus equity income equals income before taxes
components: Income from continuing operations before equity investments and income taxes
Income from continuing operations before income taxes
formulas.operation: Income from continuing operations before equity investments and income taxes + (Loss) income from equity investments
formulas.result_label: Income from continuing operations before income taxes

formulas.formula: Income before taxes minus tax provision equals income from continuing operations
components: Income from continuing operations before income taxes
formulas.operation: Income from continuing operations before income taxes - Provision for income taxes

formulas.formula: Continuing operations plus discontinued operations equals net income
components: Loss from discontinued operations, net of tax
formulas.operation: Income from continuing operations + Loss from discontinued operations, net of tax

formulas.formula: Net income minus redeemable NCI dividends equals net income to shareholders
components: Net income attributable to the Company shareholders
formulas.operation: Net income - Dividends on redeemable non-controlling interests
formulas.result_label: Net income attributable to the Company shareholders

OCI component for financial derivatives on the Comprehensive Income statement
OCI component for pension plans on the Comprehensive Income statement
OCI component for foreign currency translations on the Comprehensive Income statement
us-gaap:Revenues appears in revenue disaggregation notes; us-gaap:RevenueFromContractWithCustomerExcludingAssessedTax is used on the face of the income statement for the same amounts

formulas.formula: Cash + Restricted cash + Trade AR + Related party AR + Inventories + Prepaid = Total current assets
components: Prepaid expenses and other current assets
formulas.operation: Cash and cash equivalents + Restricted cash + Accounts receivable - Trade, net + Accounts receivable - Related parties + Inventories + Prepaid expenses and other current assets

formulas.formula: Total current assets + Operating lease assets + PP&E net + Equity investments + Goodwill + Intangibles + Other assets = Total assets
formulas.operation: Total current assets + Operating lease assets + Property, plant and equipment, net + Equity investments + Goodwill + Intangible assets, net + Other assets

formulas.formula: PP&E gross minus accumulated depreciation = PP&E net
formulas.operation: Property, plant and equipment (gross) - Less: Accumulated depreciation

formulas.formula: Current maturities + Short-term debt + Trade AP + Related party AP + Accrued liabilities = Total current liabilities
formulas.operation: Current maturities of long-term debt + Short-term debt + Accounts payable - Trade + Accounts payable - Related parties + Accrued and other current liabilities

formulas.formula: Company equity + NCI = Total equity
components: Total Company share of shareholders equity
formulas.operation: Total Company share of shareholders equity + Non-controlling interests

formulas.formula: Common stock + APIC + Retained earnings + AOCI + Treasury stock = Company share of equity
components: Total Company share of shareholders equity
formulas.operation: Ordinary shares + Additional paid-in capital + Retained earnings + Accumulated other comprehensive loss - Treasury stock
formulas.result_label: Total Company share of shareholders equity

formulas.formula: Total current liabilities + Long-term debt + Operating lease liabilities + Other liabilities + Deferred income taxes + Redeemable NCI + Total equity = Total liabilities, redeemable NCI and equity
components: Total liabilities, redeemable non-controlling interests and equity
formulas.operation: Total current liabilities + Long-term debt + Operating lease liabilities + Other liabilities + Deferred income taxes + Redeemable non-controlling interests + Total equity
formulas.result_label: Total liabilities, redeemable non-controlling interests and equity

formulas.formula: Total assets = Total liabilities, redeemable NCI and equity
components: Total liabilities, redeemable non-controlling interests and equity
formulas.operation: Total assets - Total liabilities, redeemable non-controlling interests and equity

formulas.formula: Net income + DDA + Impairments + Debt amortization + SBC + Equity loss + Distributions + Deferred tax + Gain on sale + AR change + Inventory change + AP change + Other = CFO
components: Distributions of earnings, net of tax
Net cash provided by operating activities
formulas.operation: Net income + Depreciation and amortization + Impairments + Amortization of debt-related costs + Share-based compensation - Equity loss (income) + Distributions of earnings, net of tax + Deferred income tax (benefit) provision - Gain on sale of business - Accounts receivable - Inventories - Accounts payable - Other, net
formulas.result_label: Net cash provided by operating activities

formulas.formula: Capex + Equity acquisitions - Sale proceeds + Hedge proceeds - Hedge payments + Other investing = CFI
components: Expenditures for property, plant and equipment
Proceeds from settlement of net investment hedges
Payments for settlement of net investment hedges
Net cash used in investing activities
formulas.operation: Proceeds from sale of business + Proceeds from settlement of net investment hedges - Expenditures for property, plant and equipment - Acquisition of equity method investments - Payments for settlement of net investment hedges - Other, net
formulas.result_label: Net cash used in investing activities

formulas.formula: Share repurchases + Dividends + Long-term debt repayment + Debt issuance costs - New debt - Commercial paper + Hedge payments - Hedge proceeds - Other = CFF (net outflow)
components: Proceeds from settlement of cash flow hedges
Payments for settlement of cash flow hedges
Net cash used in financing activities
formulas.operation: Issuance of long-term debt + Proceeds from settlement of cash flow hedges + Other, net - Repurchases of Company ordinary shares - Dividends paid - common stock - Payments of debt issuance costs - Repayment of long-term debt + Net repayments of commercial paper - Payments for settlement of cash flow hedges
formulas.result_label: Net cash used in financing activities

formulas.formula: CFO + CFI + CFF + FX effect = Change in cash
components: Net cash provided by operating activities
Net cash used in investing activities
Net cash used in financing activities
Effect of exchange rate changes on cash
(Decrease) increase in cash and cash equivalents and restricted cash
formulas.operation: Net cash provided by operating activities + Net cash used in investing activities + Net cash used in financing activities + Effect of exchange rate changes on cash
formulas.result_label: (Decrease) increase in cash and cash equivalents and restricted cash

formulas.formula: Beginning cash + Change = Ending cash
components: Cash and cash equivalents and restricted cash at beginning of period
(Decrease) increase in cash and cash equivalents and restricted cash
Cash and cash equivalents and restricted cash at end of period
formulas.operation: Cash and cash equivalents and restricted cash at beginning of period + (Decrease) increase in cash and cash equivalents and restricted cash
formulas.result_label: Cash and cash equivalents and restricted cash at end of period

cross_statement_checks.check: Retained earnings change on BS matches Net income minus Dividends minus adjustments
cross_statement_checks.note: Retained earnings increased from 9692 to 10366, a change of 674. Net income per IS is 1970. Dividends to common stock from CF is 1283. Dividends to redeemable NCI is 5. Share-based compensation charged to retained earnings was 8 (debit). 1970 - 1283 - 5 - 8 = 674. Match is confirmed arithmetically: change = 674.

operating_leases.current_location: The current portion of operating lease liabilities is embedded within 'Accrued and other current liabilities' (2239 million at Sep 30, 2024). No separate XBRL tag for OperatingLeaseLiabilityCurrent was found in the undimensioned XBRL facts provided. The filing discloses noncurrent operating lease liabilities of 1360 million as a separate balance sheet line item (us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLiabilityNoncurrent). The current portion is included in Accrued and other current liabilities per the balance sheet structure.
operating_leases.flag: Current operating lease liability not separately disclosed on balance sheet face; hidden in Accrued and other current liabilities

components.label: Amortization of debt-related costs (from CF statement)

depreciation_and_amortization.note: The CF statement shows DepreciationDepletionAndAmortization of 1133 as one line and AmortizationOfFinancingCostsAndDiscounts of 9 as a separate line. The 1133 is confirmed by the segment reconciliation table in the notes which shows D&A expense of 1133 for nine months 2024. The 9 million of debt cost amortization is separate.

accounts_payable.combined_with: Separate Trade and Related party lines on balance sheet
accounts_payable.detail: Trade AP is 3063 and Related party AP is 563 per balance sheet; total AP is 3626. Both are pure trade payables split by related vs non-related party. No combination with accrued liabilities.

accounts_receivable.detail: Trade AR net is 3682 (NonrelatedPartyMember) plus Related party AR of 264. The filing shows AR net of allowance for credit losses of 4 million. Pure trade AR (non-related party) is 3682. Total AR including related party is 3946.

capex.note: PaymentsToAcquirePropertyPlantAndEquipment of 1335 million for nine months 2024. No separate intangibles capex line on CF statement. No supplemental disclosure of capital expenditures incurred but not yet paid was identified in the XBRL facts provided.

items.description: Acquisition of equity method investments - 35% stake in NATPET for approximately 500 million plus other equity method investment acquisitions totaling 539 million

short_term_debt.note: Short-term debt per BS is 121 million comprised entirely of precious metal financings. Commercial paper and U.S. Receivables Facility had zero outstanding at Sep 30, 2024. Current maturities of long-term debt is separately shown at 7 million.

sbc.note: ShareBasedCompensation of 71 million per CF statement for nine months ended Sep 30, 2024. No breakdown by function was provided in the XBRL facts or notes summary.

interest_expense.source: Gross interest expense us-gaap:InterestExpenseNonoperating = 365 million for nine months 2024 per IS and segment reconciliation. Interest income us-gaap:InvestmentIncomeInterest = 114 million. Net interest expense = 251 million as shown in the MD&A reconciliation table. The IS presents gross interest expense and gross interest income as separate line items.

flags: Effective rate of 20.4% confirmed by XBRL fact us-gaap:EffectiveIncomeTaxRateContinuingOperations = 0.204 for 2024-01-01 to 2024-09-30
Pretax income is positive so no fallback needed

inventory.note: Inventory breakdown from Note 5: Finished goods 3382, Work-in-process 211, Raw materials and supplies 1668, Total 5261 as of Sep 30, 2024

formula_checks.formula: Trade revenues + Related party revenues = Total Sales and other operating revenues
Total revenues minus total operating costs equals operating income
Cost of sales + Impairments + SGA + RD = Total operating costs
Operating income plus non-operating items equals income before equity and taxes
Income before equity and taxes plus equity income equals income before taxes
Income before taxes minus tax provision equals income from continuing operations
Continuing operations plus discontinued operations equals net income
Net income minus redeemable NCI dividends equals net income to shareholders
Cash + Restricted cash + Trade AR + Related party AR + Inventories + Prepaid = Total current assets
Total current assets + Operating lease assets + PP&E net + Equity investments + Goodwill + Intangibles + Other assets = Total assets
PP&E gross minus accumulated depreciation = PP&E net
Current maturities + Short-term debt + Trade AP + Related party AP + Accrued liabilities = Total current liabilities
Company equity + NCI = Total equity
Common stock + APIC + Retained earnings + AOCI + Treasury stock = Company share of equity
Total current liabilities + Long-term debt + Operating lease liabilities + Other liabilities + Deferred income taxes + Redeemable NCI + Total equity = Total liabilities, redeemable NCI and equity
Total assets = Total liabilities, redeemable NCI and equity
Net income + DDA + Impairments + Debt amortization + SBC + Equity loss + Distributions + Deferred tax + Gain on sale + AR change + Inventory change + AP change + Other = CFO
Capex + Equity acquisitions - Sale proceeds + Hedge proceeds - Hedge payments + Other investing = CFI
Share repurchases + Dividends + Long-term debt repayment + Debt issuance costs - New debt - Commercial paper + Hedge payments - Hedge proceeds - Other = CFF (net outflow)
CFO + CFI + CFF + FX effect = Change in cash
Beginning cash + Change = Ending cash
